name: dashboard-pcm-cloudflar
description: Portal PCM — acompanhamento premium de solicitações e ORCs no ecossistema Cloudflare.

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @pcm/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @pcm/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @pcm/web && npm run lint --workspace @pcm/api
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build
